data.title: BlackRock's Head Of Digital Asset Strategy To Join Ethereum Treasury Company SharpLink
data.description:

data.title: Asia-Pacific Companies and Local Governments Sell $1,500,000,000,000 in Bonds As Investors Flee US Dollar Assets: Report
data.description:
Companies and non-sovereign issuers in the Asia-Pacific region have been hawking bonds at a record rate as investors look to move away from US dollar assets, according to a new Bloomberg report. Non-sovereign issuers are non-federal bond issuers like local and regional governments and public agencies.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/07/25/asia-pacific-companies-and-local-governments-sell-1500000000000-in-bonds-as-investors-flee-us-dollar-assets-report/

data.title: Uniswap Foundation Launches Angstrom DEX with MEV Protection
data.description:
Uniswap Foundation introduces Angstrom, a DEX with native MEV protection, aiming to address Ethereum's MEV challenges.
source: https://coincu.com/350845-uniswap-foundation-angstrom-dex-launch

data.title: SharpLink Gaming taps Joseph Chalom from BlackRock as co-CEO
data.description:
SharpLink Gaming onboarded Joseph Chalom, former head of digital asset strategy at BlackRock. Chalom expressed his belief that Ethereum has the ability to become a hub for bridging crypto and traditional finance.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/sharplink-gaming-joseph-chalom-as-co-ceo/

data.title: Nasdaq-listed Wellgistics Health adopts XRP Ledger for real-time payments
data.description:
Wellgistics adopts XRP for real-time healthcare payments. XRP to serve as treasury, collateral, and income tool. $50M funding backs XRP strategy amid rising adoption. Nasdaq-listed Wellgistics Health is taking a bold leap into blockchain-based finance by integrating Ripple’s XRP and the XRP Ledger (XRPL) into its core operations
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/nasdaq-listed-wellgistics-health-adopts-xrp-ledger-for-real-time-payments/

data.title: Japan and the US divided over how trade deal profits will be split
data.description:
The United States and Japan are at odds over how to divide profits from a newly signed trade and investment package announced last Tuesday. Both governments have agreed to a $550 billion economic framework involving tariffs and joint investments, but there’s a rift over how returns from the deal will be shared between the two […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/japan-and-the-us-divided-over-trade-profits/

data.title: Ethereum exit queue reaches all-time high in record validator withdrawal
data.description:
The validator queue to unstake ETH from the Beacon Chain contract is at an all-time high. The recent market rally may be driving older validators to free up their ETH and realize profits.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ethereum-exit-queue-reaches-all-time-high/

data.title: Is $1 Dogecoin ‚Inevitable‘? Analyst Cites Perfect Storm Of Factors
data.description:
Dogecoin could be approaching a structural breakout that carries it to the long-discussed $1 threshold, according to crypto analyst Stephan Burns, who in a July 24 livestream described a “perfect storm” of monetary design, market structure and what he characterizes as rare astrological alignments. Burns framed the move as an “inevitability,” while acknowledging timing uncertainty, arguing that the next parabolic advance could emerge within months. Is $1 Dogecoin Inevitable? Burns built his case first on tokenomics. Dogecoin’s fixed issuance of 10,000 DOGE per one-minute block—approximately 5
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/dogecoin/is-1-dogecoin-inevitable-analyst-perfect-storm/

data.title: European companies are losing hundreds of millions of euros to Trump’s tariffs
data.description:

These penalties are already crushing bottom lines, even before the full tariffs go live. European officials are locked in talks with the White House, trying to […]
